items.prompt: I'm comfortable making decisions with incomplete information.
Losing $100 feels worse than gaining $100 feels good.
Most people can be trusted in a one-time interaction.
I'd punish unfair behavior even at a cost to myself.
When someone is short with me, they usually mean it personally.
I prefer to think things through rather than go with my gut.
Tight deadlines bring out my best work.
I notice small details others miss.
I'd rather try something new than stick with what I know works.
